pageTitle: Upload documents to support your application
caption: Make an application
heading: Upload documents to support your application (optional)
guidanceText: You should only upload documents that are relevant to your application such as a draft order or witness statement.
beforeUploadText: Before you upload the document, give it a name that tells the court what it is, for example ‘Job offer letter’.
fileTypesText: Each document must be less than 100MB. You can upload the following file types: DOC/DOCX (Word), XLS/XLSM (Excel), PPT/PPTX (PowerPoint), PDF, RTF, TXT, CSV, JPG/JPEG, PNG, BMP, TIF/TIFF.
